Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 02/02/2026
Image reference: 2026-02-02_gms-week-05-and-just-like-that_img1.jpg
… January 2026 joins the pages of history as being the purveyors of ongoing misery for the global ship recycling world as despite theodd wave of tonnage that has made us numb to the conflicting signals of the markets based on supply trends across the last 5 years, something eye-catching did change this week. And it would seem that the rising ripples from Trump's train wreck of activity has posed global markets to setup a serious "Debbie Downer" for February 2026, especially if the current trends persist. To start, we have noteworthy surges to report this week.
